tiles.title: Ceramic Blue Tile
tiles.description: Premium ceramic tile with a deep blue glaze finish, perfect for modern bathroom walls.

tiles.title: Marble White Elegance
tiles.description: Natural white marble with subtle grey veins. Adds a touch of luxury to any living space.

tiles.title: Rustic Terracotta
tiles.description: Traditional earthy red terracotta tile, ideal for outdoor patios and rustic kitchens.

tiles.title: Slate Grey Stone
tiles.description: Highly durable natural slate stone, designed for heavy-duty outdoor flooring.

tiles.title: Glossy Emerald Tile
tiles.description: Vibrant emerald green wall tile with a high-gloss finish for a bold interior statement.

tiles.title: Polished Granite Black
tiles.description: High-shine black granite, extremely scratch-resistant and perfect for kitchen counters.

tiles.title: Mosaic Sea Breeze
tiles.description: Handcrafted glass mosaic tiles in varying shades of blue and turquoise.

tiles.title: Wood-Look Oak
tiles.description: Porcelain tile featuring a realistic wood grain texture for a cozy, warm look.

tiles.title: Industrial Matte Concrete
tiles.description: Modern industrial style porcelain tile with a matte cement finish.

tiles.title: Vintage Patterned Decor
tiles.description: Classic geometric patterns inspired by vintage European cafe designs.

tiles.title: Beige Travertine
tiles.description: Natural travertine stone with a unique porous texture, great for pool decks.

tiles.title: Pearl Hexagon Mosaic
tiles.description: Elegant white hexagonal mosaic tiles for kitchen backsplashes or feature walls.

tiles.title: Sandstone Sahara
tiles.description: Textured sandstone tiles that provide a natural, slip-resistant surface.

tiles.title: Gold Vein Royal Marble
tiles.description: Rare marble with prominent gold veins, creating a regal atmosphere.

tiles.title: Charcoal Matte Porcelain
tiles.description: Sleek dark grey porcelain tile, ideal for minimalist and contemporary designs.
